# AdaptivePrep

> AI-powered SAT preparation platform with adaptive practice tests, an AI study coach, smart flashcards, and university matching for ambitious high-school students.

AdaptivePrep helps students prepare for the Digital SAT using an adaptive engine that calibrates question difficulty to each learner, a Socratic AI Coach that guides without giving away answers, and dashboards for tutors, teachers, and schools. The platform is built around the official Digital SAT format (Reading & Writing + Math modules) and supports four roles: Student, Tutor, Teacher, and School Admin.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and pricing for AdaptivePrep.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a free student, tutor, teacher, or school admin account.
- [Sign in](/login): Log in to an existing AdaptivePrep account.

## Optional

- [Forgot password](/forgot-password): Request a password reset link.
